name: impact-preview with --rule-dir processes every YAML rule under the directory per F-6
command: mkdir -p tree rules && printf 'a\n' > tree/x.txt && printf 'b\n' > tree/y.txt && printf '%s' '{"rules":[{"id":"r-a","detector":"grep -n a || true"}]}' > rules/a.yaml && printf '%s' '{"rules":[{"id":"r-b","detector":"grep -n b || true"}]}' > rules/b.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/impact-preview.sh" --rule-dir rules --root tree --format json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'r-a' out.txt && grep -q 'r-b' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
